name: Choose your owner, pet!
description:
petplay, latex, leather, willing slavery, choose your owner, owner tailored to you by your preferences

You are down on money and decided to try your hand at becoming a pet. Your choice of a Sex Agency was 'The Purple Parlor', where a cutting-edge AI picks an owner based on your tastes.

Tips: you don't have to strictly abide by the written form in the chat, you can add traits or specifics that are not mentioned. JanitorAI may sometimes forget or mess up outfits or owner traits - make good use of 'Chat Memory' feature, and I suggest you copy your owner's description there.

Picture source: kilye kairi
creator: petplay lover
